title: Connect Admin Dashboard to Backend Database - Frontend Implementation

requirements.summary: Update useQueries hook to fetch real assessment data from backend query functions
acceptanceCriteria: useAdminAssessments hook calls backend query function and returns assessment list
Loading states are properly handled during data fetch
Error states are handled and displayed to user
Data is properly transformed from backend format to frontend AdminAssessmentRow type

file_operations.description: Replace the empty array return in useAdminAssessments with a call to actor.getAllAssessmentSummaries(). Transform the backend AssessmentSummary[] data to AdminAssessmentRow[] format by mapping id to string, extracting user.name as studentName, calculating score from scores object (diet + exercise + sleep + hydration), setting totalQuestions to 40, converting timestamp to submittedAt Date, and deriving answers breakdown from the scores object. Ensure proper error handling and loading states are exposed through the query object.

requirements.summary: Connect QuickStatsCards component to display real statistics from backend data
acceptanceCriteria: Total Assessments card displays actual count from backend
Average Score card shows calculated average from all submissions
Alert Users card shows count of users with low scores
Recent Submissions card shows count of assessments from last 7 days
All cards update in real-time when new assessments are submitted

file_operations.description: Add a new useAdminStats hook that calls actor.getAdminDashboardStats() and returns the statistics object containing totalAssessments, averageScore, alertUsersCount, and recentSubmissionsCount. Set up React Query with queryKey ['adminStats'] and ensure the query is enabled when actor is available. Handle loading and error states appropriately.

Import and use the new useAdminStats hook instead of calculating stats from assessments array. Remove the local stats calculation logic and directly use the values from the hook (totalAssessments, averageScore, alertUsersCount, recentSubmissionsCount). Update the loading skeleton to trigger when the stats query isLoading is true. Ensure the component re-renders when stats data changes.
Remove this file as statistics calculation is now handled by the backend and no longer needed on the frontend.

requirements.summary: Connect UserAssessmentDataTable component to display real backend data with all filtering and sorting functionality
acceptanceCriteria: Table displays all submitted assessments from backend
Search filter works on student names
Date range filter works on submission timestamps
Score range filter works on assessment scores
Sorting functionality works on all columns
Pagination works correctly with real data
CSV export includes all real assessment data

file_operations.description: Replace the static SAMPLE_ASSESSMENT_DATA with data from useAdminAssessments hook. Add loading state handling to show skeleton or loading message when isLoading is true. Add error state handling to display error message if query fails. Ensure all existing filter logic (search, date range, score range), sorting, pagination, and CSV export continue to work with the real data from the backend. The data transformation from backend format to AdminAssessmentRow is already handled in the useQueries hook, so the table should work with the transformed data directly.
